subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Divine Kingdom! It is morning, and every soul is occupied with its own fancy, while 'Abdu'l-Bahá is thinking of the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه بملکوت الهی صبح است و هر کس بخیالی مشغول و عبدالبهاء بیاد احباء و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
